subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1916
subcodes.first_line: Ridvaniyyih, there is a Garden of God. Human beings are trees growing therein. The Gardener is Our Father. When He sees a little tree in a place too small
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @stories; anecdotes, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @consolation and comfort, @symbolism
